sites.name: Environmental Conservation - Site Framework
sites.dataKeywords: act_1 Switch to LED Bulbs Replace incandescent bulbs with ENERGY STAR-certified LED bulbs. Swap out older incandescent or CFL bulbs for high-efficiency LED bulbs in your most-used fixtures (kitchen, living room, exterior lights). Focus first on the 5–10 fixtures you use most. LEDs use up to 80% less energy and last much longer. Energy home_energy lighting low_cost beginner act_2 Lower Thermostat by 2°F Reduce heating or cooling setpoint by two degrees. Adjust your thermostat two degrees lower in winter (or higher in summer) and stick with it for at least a month. Most households barely notice the difference in comfort, but energy savings can add up significantly over a year. heating_cooling behavior_change act_3 Weekly Car-Free Day Commit to one day per week without driving. Choose one day each week where you avoid using a personal car altogether. Use walking, cycling, public transit, or carpooling instead. Start with local errands and commutes that are easiest to shift. sites.dataKeywords: severe_toothache_after_hours severe_toothache Severe Toothache (Including After 8:00 PM) If you have a severe, throbbing toothache that does not improve with over‑the‑counter pain relievers, you may have an infection or abscess that requires urgent care. Do not ignore worsening pain, fever, facial swelling, or difficulty swallowing. Rinse gently with warm salt water, floss carefully around the painful tooth to remove trapped food, and take an over‑the‑counter pain reliever as directed if you are able. Do NOT place aspirin directly on the tooth or gums, and avoid very hot or cold foods and drinks. 555-0199 555-0100 For severe toothache occurring after 8:00 PM (for example, around 9:00 PM), call the after‑hours emergency number and leave a detailed voicemail with your name, phone number, symptoms, and when the pain began. pages.dataKeywords: youth_families Youth & Families Programs that support children, teens, and families through mentoring, enrichment, basic needs assistance, and family stability services. education Education Initiatives that improve educational access and outcomes from early childhood through adult learning, including tutoring, after-school programs, and college readiness. neighborhoods Neighborhoods Community-building efforts focused on specific neighborhoods, such as resident-led projects, safety, beautification, and local leadership development. environment Environment Projects that protect and improve the natural environment, including conservation, climate resilience, green spaces, and environmental education. health_wellness Health & Wellness Programs that promote physical and mental health, access to care, healthy lifestyles, and wellness supports for all ages. arts_culture Arts & Culture Efforts that expand access to arts, culture, and creative expression, including public art, arts education, and support for cultural organizations. community_impact_grant Community Impact Grant Community Impact Flexible operating and project support for high-impact initiatives that advance education, health, and neighborhood vitality across the county. open Entire County youth_opportunity_scholarship Youth Opportunity Scholarship Fund Youth Opportunity Scholarships and program support for youth pursuing postsecondary education, workforce training, and leadership development. Countywide with priority neighborhoods youth_mentoring_partnerships Youth Mentoring Partnerships Mentoring Partnerships Support for evidence-based mentoring programs that connect caring adults with young people ages 8–18. City of Greenfield family_literacy_initiative Family Literacy Initiative Family Literacy Grants to expand family-centered literacy, early reading, and parent engagement programs in high-need communities. Priority school catchment areas summer_learning_enrichment Summer Learning & Enrichment Grants Summer Learning Support for high-quality summer learning programs that prevent learning loss and provide safe enrichment opportunities. neighborhood_spark_mini_grants Neighborhood Spark Mini-Grants Neighborhood Spark Small grants for resident-led projects that build connection, safety, and pride at the block or neighborhood level. pages.dataKeywords: course_sacred_foundations_01 Sacred Foundations: Introduction to Mystery School Teachings A gentle, beginner-friendly overview of mystery school lineages, meditation, and energy practices designed for modern seekers. beginner online_live includes live Q&A sessions weekly practice circles downloadable study guide course_awakening_path_02 The Awakening Path: Beginner Mystery School Immersion Four-week immersive journey through the basic principles of energy, archetypes, and ritual for beginners. hybrid lesson replays available private student forum course_elements_beginner_03 Elements & Directions: Foundations of Ritual Learn to work safely with the four elements and cardinal directions in simple daily rituals. guided ritual scripts elemental meditation audios course_shadow_works_04 Shadow Work Basics A gentle introduction to shadow work, emotional alchemy, and integration practices. online_self_paced journal prompts downloadable workbook course_tarot_gateways_05 Tarot Gateways: Intermediate Archetypal Study Deepen your relationship with the Major Arcana as living archetypes in your life. intermediate practice readings certificate of completion course_energy_alchemy_06 Energy Alchemy for Empaths Protect, cleanse, and recharge your field with practical energy tools. all_levels energy hygiene checklist course_advanced_ritual_07 Advanced Temple Ritual Training In-depth training in ceremonial design, group facilitation, and lineage ethics. advanced in_person in-person temple initiations small cohort format course_kabbalah_paths_08 Paths of the Tree: Kabbalistic Map of Consciousness Explore the Tree of Life as a mystical roadmap for spiritual growth. downloadable diagrams self-paced lessons course_dreamwork_09 Dreamwork & Astral Navigation Learn to work consciously with dreams, symbols, and subtle realms. dream journal templates course_beginner_budget_10 Mystery School Essentials (Budget Track) A concise, budget-friendly version of our core teachings for absolute beginners. audio-only lectures lifetime access course_beginner_premium_11 Foundations with Mentoring (Premium Beginner Track) Beginner curriculum plus small-group mentoring and additional support. small group mentoring private community group course_mystery_retreat_12 In-Person Mystery School Weekend A residential weekend at the retreat center introducing core temple practices. meals included shared lodging faq_wheelchair_access_01 Is your retreat center wheelchair accessible? Yes. Our main temple, dining hall, and most guest rooms are wheelchair accessible. We have step-free access to common areas, ramps at building entrances, and at least two fully accessible ground-floor rooms with roll-in showers. If you use a wheelchair or mobility aid, please let us know on your booking form so we can reserve an appropriate room and parking spot. Accessibility wheelchair accessibility mobility ramps rooms faq_dietary_needs_02 Can you accommodate special dietary needs such as vegan, gluten-free, or dairy-f

pages.dataKeywords: asp_4_math_puzzles 4th Grade Math Puzzles Club math_science Students tackle logic puzzles, math games, and problem-solving challenges in a fun, collaborative setting. fourth_grade per_month Discount available for siblings. tuesday thursday 3:00 PM 4:15 PM Room 204 Ms. Rivera asp_4_math_club 4th Grade Math Club Preparation for math contests and enrichment beyond the regular curriculum. Includes materials and snacks. monday wednesday 3:05 PM Room 210 Mr. Chen asp_4_stem_lab 4th Grade STEM Lab Hands-on science experiments and engineering challenges for curious minds. fifth_grade Ends later than most other clubs. 2:50 PM 4:45 PM Science Lab Mrs. Patel asp_4_science_explorers Science Explorers (4th Grade) Explore geology, biology, and physics through weekly projects. Safety goggles provided. 3:15 PM 4:30 PM Room 108 Dr. Gomez asp_4_coding_basics Coding Basics for 4th & 5th Grade technology Intro to block-based coding and simple robotics. Laptop access included. 3:10 PM 4:20 PM Computer Lab Mr. Allen asp_3_4_homework_help 3rd & 4th Grade Homework Help homework_help Quiet space with teacher support for daily homework. third_grade per_week Fee waived for students on free/reduced lunch. 4:00 PM Library Support Staff asp_4_art_club 4th Grade Art Club arts Drawing, painting, and craft projects using a variety of media. Covers art supplies. Art Room Ms. Lopez asp_4_soccer 4th Grade Soccer Skills sports Skill-building and small scrimmages on the lower field. Lower Field Coach Smith asp_2_reading_club 2nd Grade Reading Club general_enrichment Read and discuss favorite chapter books together. second_grade Room 112 Mrs. Johnson asp_1_music_and_movement Music & Movement Singing, rhythm games, and creative movement for younger students. kindergarten first_grade free Funded by PTA. 2:45 PM 3:30 PM Music Room Mr. Brown asp_3_chess_club 3rd Grade Chess Club other Learn chess basics and practice strategies with classmates. friday Parent Volunteers asp_5_science_olympiad Science Olympiad (5th Grade) Competitive science team focusing on experiments and engineering builds. per_semester Covers tournament fees and materials. 3:20 PM Mr. Nguyen route_oak_1 Oak Street Early Run Primary Oak Street route serving the north end of the neighborhood. k_5_elementary 7:20 AM Lincoln Elementary School Oak Street Maple Avenue 5th Avenue This is typically the earliest-arriving Oak Street route. route_oak_2 Oak & Cedar Loop Serves Oak Street south of 10th and connects to Cedar Lane. 7:32 AM Cedar Lane 10th Street route_oak_3 Oak Street Late Run Later pickup option for families on Oak Street and Birch Road. 7:44 AM Birch Road route_oak_ms Oak Street Middle School Express Express route for middle school students along Oak Street. middle_school 7:10 AM Lincoln Middle School Pine Street Not available to elementary students. route_oak_late_after_745 Oak & Elm Connector Connects Oak Street and Elm Drive with a slightly later arrival. 7:50 AM Elm Drive Arrives after 7:45 AM. route_main_1 Main

pages.dataKeywords: pp_3yr_stereo_premium 3-Year Protection Plan car_stereo Covers mechanical and electrical failures for eligible car stereos, including premium touchscreen and navigation units, for 3 years from purchase date. active pp_2yr_audio_basic 2-Year Protection Plan any_product_type Extended coverage for most car audio products, protecting against defects and failures beyond the manufacturer warranty. pp_4yr_amp_heavy_use 4-Year Amplifier Protection Plan amplifier Long-term protection for car amplifiers used in daily or competition systems, covering internal component failures. pp_1yr_accessory_plus 1-Year Accessory Protection Plan installation_accessory Protection against defects for installation accessories such as dash kits, wiring kits, and adapters. ship_standard standard Standard Shipping Reliable ground shipping with full tracking. Free on qualifying orders. ship_expedited expedited Expedited Shipping Faster shipping option for customers who need their gear sooner. ship_two_day two_day 2-Day Shipping Guaranteed delivery within sound with coaxial and component speaker sets in popular sizes. subwoofers Subwoofers Add deep, impactful bass to your system with powered and passive car subwoofers. amplifiers Amplifiers Power your speakers and subs with mono, 4-channel, and multi-channel car amplifiers. packages_bundles Packages & Bundles Curated subwoofer and amplifier packages, system bundles, and value kits. (2020 Rules) planning-permit-rear-extension-2020 This article explains the 2020-era rules for rear extensions, including when planning permits were required, how private open space and overlooking rules were applied, and what exemptions existed for small additions. A look back at the 2020 requirements for planning permits on rear extensions. town planning art_kitchen_budget_renovation_2023 Designing a Kitchen Renovation on a $35,000 Budget kitchen-renovation-35000-budget A $35,000 budget can deliver a high-impact kitchen renovation when you prioritise layout, storage and lighting. This guide breaks down where to spend and where to save, including joinery choices, benchtop materials and appliance packages. Practical tips for planning a stylish kitchen renovation on a $35k budget. kitchen budgeting kitchen renovation budget planning costs art_bathroom_waterproofing_2023 Bathroom Waterproofing Basics Every Homeowner Should Know bathroom-waterproofing-basics Waterproofing is one of the most critical parts of any bathroom renovation. Soft pastel washes describe a meadow shimmering after a summer rainstorm. art_cliffside_light Cliffside Light oil_on_canvas vibrant Impasto strokes catch the last rays of light on a rugged coastline. and muted tones. art_figure_study_motion Figure Study in Motion figure ink_on_paper Loose ink lines capture a dancer mid-turn in a single continuous gesture. art_stilllife_citrus_bowl Citrus Bowl A pages.dataKeywords:
aff_001 I offer myself the same kindness I would offer a dear friend. Self-Compassion aff_002 It is okay to be imperfect; I am learning and growing every day. aff_003 My worth is not defined by my productivity today. aff_004 I am gentle with myself as I move through this day. aff_005 I forgive myself for past mistakes and choose compassion now. aff_006 I am deserving of rest, care, and understanding. aff_007 I speak to myself with softness and respect. aff_008 I am doing the best I can with the tools I have right now. aff_009 I am grateful for my body and all it allows me to experience. Gratitude Body Appreciation aff_010 Abundance flows to me in expected and unexpected ways. Abundance aff_011 I trust the timing of my life and the wisdom of my path. Spirituality Trust aff_012 With every breath, I release tension and invite calm. Calm Breathwork aff_013 I am worthy of love exactly as I am in this moment. Self-Love aff_014 I allow myself to take up space and to be fully seen. Confidence Authenticity art_001 Mindfulness in Five Minutes: A Beginner’s Breathing Practice mindfulness-in-five-minutes-beginners-breathing-practice A short, approachable breathing exercise to introduce you to daily mindfulness. Mindfulness doesn’t have to be a 30-minute session. In this beginner-friendly guide, you’ll learn a simple five-minute breathing practice you can do anytime during your day...

1. Find a comfortable position...
2. Gently close your eyes...
3. Bring your awareness to your breath... article Mindfulness Basics mindfulness breathwork beginner Maya Rivers art_002 Noticing the Now: A 7-Minute Mindful Senses Check-In noticing-the-now-7-minute-mindful-senses-check-in Use your five senses to ground yourself in the present moment in just seven minutes. This senses-based check-in is designed for busy beginners. Over the next seven minutes, you will move through sight, sound, smell, taste, and touch to gently anchor yourself in the present...

Step 1: Pause and notice what you see...
Step 2: Shift to the sounds around you... grounding art_003 How to Start a 10-Minute Morning Mindfulness Ritual 10-minute-morning-mindfulness-ritual Create a simple 10-minute ritual to begin your day with clarity and calm. A short morning ritual can shift the tone of your entire day. This 10-minute practice weaves together breath, intention-setting, and gentle body awareness...

Minute 1–2: Arrive in your body...
Minute 3–5: Follow your natural breath... Morning Rituals routine morning Jonah Lee art_004 Beginner’s Guide to Mindful Listening in 8 Minutes beginners-guide-to-mindful-listening-in-8-minutes Practice mindful listening to deepen your relationships and ease anxiety. Mindful listening invites you to be fully present with another person—and with yourself. In this eight-minute practice, you’ll explore how to listen without fixing or judging...

Step 1: Notice your intention...
Step 2: Soften your body... relationships communication art_005 A Gentle 6-Minute Body Scan for Mindfu

pages.body: Local Mover Home Get a Quote Book Now Pricing Estimator Labor Only Deals & Promotions Moving Insurance Moving Insurance & Protection Compare coverage options, see what each plan protects, and connect the right protection to your move. Select your coverage Choose a protection plan and insured value that match the total value of the items you are moving. Total value of belongings to protect $ Estimate what it would cost to replace everything you are moving at today's prices. You can adjust this later. Compare plans All plans Basic coverage Full value protection Plan Coverage type Coverage limit Pricing Actions Plan details Select a plan on the left to see what it covers. Back to booking Use this plan for my move Loading insurance options... Understand your coverage options Here's how basic coverage compares to full value protection in a typical local move. Basic coverage Often included at no or low additional charge as a baseline protection. Coverage is typically based on the weight of your shipment, not each item's replacement cost. Claims are usually paid at a fixed amount per pound per item, which may be less than the item's market value. Can be appropriate for smaller moves or shipments with lower overall replacement value. View basic coverage plans Full value protection Aims to cover the cost to repair, replace, or reimburse for items that are lost or damaged during the move, subject to plan terms. You select an insured value for your shipment and pay a premium linked to that value or your move estimate. Well suited for higher-value items such as electronics, artwork, heirlooms, or new furniture. May include deductibles, exclusions, or special limits, so it's important to review plan details before booking. View full value protection options Tips for choosing a coverage level Walk through each room and estimate what it would cost to replace major items at today's prices. Include electronics, appliances, and specialty items you plan to move, not just furniture. Th

GroundCore delivered detailed basement excavation for a two-level underground car park on Clarendon Street, including temporary propping, shotcrete walls and dewatering. Tight access and heritage facades required staged excavation and continuous monitoring to maintain adjoining building stability. Clarendon Developments Pty Ltd proj_basement_melb_2021_bourke Bourke Street CBD Basement Excavation bourke-street-cbd-basement-excavation Deep basement excavation for a 3-level basement in Melbourne CBD with strict vibration limits. This CBD project involved excavation to 11 metres below street level for three basement levels. GroundCore managed a complex retention system of soldier piles and shotcrete, real-time vibration monitoring, and night-time spoil haulage to minimise CBD disruption. CBD Towers Consortium proj_basement_melb_2022_stkilda St Kilda Road Residential Basement st-kilda-road-residential-basement Basement excavation for a premium residential tower with constrained access on St Kilda Road. pages.dataKeywords: slope_stability_retaining_walls Slope Stability & Retaining Walls slope-stability-retaining-walls service_slope_stability.html geotechnical_engineering Advanced slope stability assessment, landslide remediation, and retaining wall design for transportation, infrastructure, and site development projects. Our slope stability and retaining wall team provides end‑to‑end support from preliminary screening through detailed numerical modeling and construction support. Services include limit‑equilibrium and finite element stability analyses, retaining wall type selection and design, landslide and embankment remediation concepts, seismic stability evaluations, and independent design reviews. subsurface_investigation Subsurface Investigation subsurface-investigation service_subsurface_investigation.html Drilling, in‑situ testing, and laboratory programs tailored to support foundation, earthworks, and infrastructure design. We scope and execute subsurface investigation programs ranging from small building sites to regional transportation corridors. Our capabilities include rotary wash drilling, hollow‑stem auger borings, CPT soundings, pressuremeter testing, geophysics, and comprehensive laboratory testing. We emphasize investigation programs targeted to specific design decisions and risk levels. deep_foundations Deep Foundations & Piling deep-foundations-piling service_deep_foundations.html Design and testing of pile foundations, drilled shafts, and ground anchors for heavy structures. We provide feasibility studies, preliminary sizing, and detailed design for driven piles, drilled shafts, micropiles, and ground anchors. Our engineers routinely support static and dynamic load testing, PDA monitoring, integrity testing, and construction phase troubleshooting for complex deep foundation systems. ground_improvement Ground Improvement & Earthworks ground-improvement-earthworks service_ground_improvement.html Ground improvement concepts, specification development, and performance verification for challenging sites. We develop ground improvement solutions such as stone columns, deep soil mixing, preload and wick drains, vibro‑compaction, and soil replacement to control settlement and liquefaction. Our involvement spans concept screening, performance‑based design, instrumentation planning, and construction monitoring. pkg_bldg_standard_borings Standard Building Foundation Borings standard-building-foundation-borings Baseline subsurface investigation for low‑ to mid‑rise building foundations using soil borings and SPT testing. building_foundations Up to 4 soil borings to 15 m depth Standard Penetration Test (SPT) at 1.5 m intervals Groundwater level observations Basic index testing (moisture content, Atterberg limits) Summary geotechnical recommendations memo Suitable for small commercial or light industrial buildings on relatively uniform soils. pkg_bldg_cpt_consol_compact Building Foundation CPT & Consolidation Package building-foundation-cpt-consolidation-packa

pages.dataKeywords: pause_membership_progress Can I pause my membership without losing my progress data? membership pause membership freeze account hold membership progress data freeze hold suspend keep progress streak vacation published cancel_membership How do I cancel my membership? You can cancel anytime from your account settings. Go to Settings → Membership → Manage plan and click “Cancel membership”. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. You will receive a confirmation email once the cancellation is processed. cancel membership end subscription cancel stop subscription end membership close account trial_billing Will I be charged at the end of my free trial? If you start a free trial on any paid plan, you won’t be charged until your trial ends. We’ll send you a reminder email 3 days before your trial expires. If you don’t cancel, your membership will automatically convert to a paid subscription at the plan’s standard price. billing free trial charges trial charge when am I billed subscription start refund_policy What is your refund policy? For monthly plans we do not offer prorated refunds, but you will keep access until the end of your billing period. For annual plans, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on your first purchase. If you’re not satisfied, contact support within 14 days and we’ll refund your payment in full. refund money back refund policy money back guarantee cancel annual prorated beginner_workouts Do you have beginner-friendly, no-equipment home workouts? Yes. You can filter our workout library by level (Beginner), equipment (No equipment), and location (Home) to find beginner-friendly home plans. Many of these offer 3 or more sessions per week with step-by-step video guidance. workouts beginner no equipment home workouts beginner workouts home training bodyweight live_class_recordings Are live classes recorded so I can watch them later? Most of our live classes are recorded and available for replay within 24 hours. Look for the “Replay available” badge on the class details page to confirm that a recording will be provided. live_classes live classes recordings replay recorded classes class replay on-demand live stream recording technical_requirements What are the technical requirements to use the app? Our web app works in modern browsers such as Chrome, Safari, Edge, and Firefox. For the best experience, we recommend a stable internet connection of at least 5 Mbps and enabling JavaScript and cookies. Mobile apps are available for iOS and Android 11 or newer. technical technical requirements devices browsers system requirements supported devices supported browsers internet speed weight_loss_guidance Can the app help me calculate calories for weight loss? Yes. Use the built-in Calorie & Macro Calculator to estimate your daily calorie target based on your age, gender, weight, height, activity level, and goal (for example, losing 0.5 kg per week). You can then email the plan to yourself and sync it with support

Ideal for families wanting an easy-going companion with show or performance potential. Priority waitlist for show and performance homes. Pet puppies placed on limited registration with spay/neuter agreement. litter_spring_blossom_2025 Spring Blossom Litter confirmed sable and tan black sable CH Riverstone Chase the Dream Riverstone Bloom in Spring OFA Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, cardiac echo normal OFA Hips B, Elbows normal, eyes clear, DM carrier Balanced working and show lines focused on biddable temperaments and correct structure. Puppies expected to excel in obedience, rally, and junior handling. A few show prospect reservations still open. Preference to co-own homes within driving distance for serious show interest. litter_winter_stars_2024 Winter Stars Litter available solid black GCHB Noble Guardian of Highland Winter Night Sky Hips A, Elbows normal, spine normal, DM clear Hips B, Elbows normal, DM clear, eyes normal service_dog_candidate Outgoing and people-focused puppies from steady, unflappable parents. Several puppies from previous cross are active therapy dogs. Two male pet puppies and one performance prospect female currently available. litter_autumn_legacy_2024 Autumn Legacy Litter completed CH Silver Creek Highland Echo Autumn Leaves v. Riverside Hips A, Elbows normal, DM carrier, eyes clear Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, cardiac normal All puppies from this litter have been placed. Information kept online for pedigree reference. Strong heads and effortless side gait; we are watching several puppies from this cross in the show ring. litter_summer_showcase_2025 Summer Showcase Litter MBIS GCHS Iron Knight of Riverside GCH Summer Breeze at Riverstone Hips A, Elbows normal, DM clear, cardiac normal, eyes clear breeding_rights Top-tier show and performance litter from multi–Best in Show sire and group-winning dam. Bred for serious show homes seeking national-level competition prospects. Show and performance homes only; co-ownership required on most show puppies. litter_family_companions_2025 Family Companions Litter Riverside Friendly Ghost Everyday Joy of Riverside Preliminary hips good, elbows normal, DM untested Hips B, elbows pending, DM clear Laid-back parents with excellent off-switch and gentle demeanor around children. Ideal for families wanting easy, moderate-energy companions. pages.dataKeywords: beginner Beginner Introductory cybersecurity content, focusing on fundamentals like Wi-Fi security, password hygiene, and safe browsing for newcomers. threats Threats Articles covering real-world threats such as phishing, malware, scams, and threat intelligence breakdowns. tools Tools Guides, walkthroughs, and reviews of security tools including VPNs, password managers, OSINT utilities, and more. ctf_practice CTF & Practice Capture-the-flag (CTF) write-ups, practice challenges, and hands-on hacking tutorials by difficulty level. reading_list_default Reading List Your default reading list for bookmarked articles across the site. practice_later Practice Later Guides, labs, and write-ups you want to come back to for hands-on practice. research Research Deeper analysis pieces, tool comparisons, and long-form articles you’re researching. favorites Favorites Your personal collection of standout articles and references. reason_very_helpful very_helpful Very helpful The article was clear, accurate, and directly useful. reason_clear_but_missing_examples clear_but_missing_examples Clear but missing examples Concepts were explained well but needed more concrete examples or demos. reason_too_short too_short Too short The article ended too quickly or skipped important details. reason_too_advanced too_advanced Too advanced The content assumed too much prior knowledge or moved too fast. reason_outdated outdated Outdated Some recommendations, tools, or screenshots are no longer accurate. reason_unclear unclear Unclear Important steps or ideas were confusing or poorly explained. reason_other other Other Your feedback does not fit any of the predefined reasons. notif_osint osint OSINT email daily notif_malware malware Malware notif_wifi_security routers, and wireless traffic. tag_phishing phishing Phishing Detecting and defending against phishing emails, websites, and scams. tag_osint Open-source intelligence techniques, tools, and workflows. tag_malware Malware analysis, detection, and removal strategies. tag_tools Security Tools General tag for security tools, utilities, and frameworks. tag_account_security account_security Account Security Protecting online accounts with MFA, strong passwords, and security hygiene. tag_vpn VPN Using virtual private networks for privacy and security. tag_vpn_setup vpn_setup VPN Setup Heirloom Tomato & Burrata Salad Local heirloom tomatoes, creamy burrata, basil pesto, and aged balsamic. appetizer dinner lacto_vegetarian nut_free starter_soup_du_jour Soup du Jour Chef’s daily soup, often featuring seasonal vegetables and house-made stock. starter_grilled_octopus Charred Mediterranean Octopus Grilled octopus with smoked paprika aioli, fingerling potatoes, and olives. seafood starter_charred_cauliflower Charred Cauliflower Bites Roasted cauliflower with tahini, pomegranate, and toasted almonds. vegan main_wild_mushroom_risotto Wild Mushroom Risotto Creamy arborio rice with mixed wild mushrooms, parmesan, and thyme. main main_eggplant_parmigiana Baked Eggplant Parmigiana Layered eggplant, basil marinara, mozzarella, and parmesan with herb crumbs. main_truffle_pappardelle Black Truffle Pappardelle Fresh pappardelle pasta with black truffle butter, mascarpone, and chives. main_grilled_sea_bass Grilled Sea Bass Pan-seared sea bass with saffron risotto and fennel salad. main_roasted_chicken Herb-Roasted Chicken Free-range chicken with roasted garlic jus, baby carrots, and potato purée. main_steak_frites Bistro Steak Frites Grilled hanger steak, herb butter, and hand-cut fries. dessert_dark_chocolate_torte Dark Chocolate Torte Flourless dark chocolate torte with raspberry coulis and vanilla crème fraîche. dessert dessert_lemon_tart Meyer Lemon Tart Meyer lemon custard in a buttery crust with brûléed meringue. dessert_artisanal_cheese Artisanal Cheese Selection Local and imported cheeses with seasonal accompaniments. side_truffle_fries Truffle Parmesan Fries Crispy fries tossed with truffle oil, parmesan, and herbs. side all_day side_seasonal_greens Seasonal Greens Sautéed market greens with garlic and lemon. drink_aperol_spritz Aperol Spritz Aperol, prosecco, and soda water over ice with an oran

pages.dataKeywords: act_rainy_pillow_fort Rainy Day Pillow Fort Adventure Build a cozy indoor fort and turn it into a storytelling and snack nook. Transform your living room into a magical hideout using pillows, blankets, and chairs. Kids help design and build the fort, then enjoy story time, quiet play, or a snack inside. years_5_8 indoors free Pillows Blankets or sheets Chairs or couch Flashlight or string lights (optional) Books or quiet toys Clear a safe area in the living room by moving small tables or breakable items. Invite kids to help gather pillows, blankets, and chairs. Work together to drape blankets over the chairs and couch to form a fort structure. Add pillows inside for comfy seating and bring in a flashlight or string lights if desired. Let kids choose a few books or quiet toys to enjoy inside the fort. End the activity with a short tidy-up, putting all pillows and blankets back. rainy_day cozy imaginative_play indoor_fun act_diy_storytelling_circle DIY Storytelling Circle Take turns adding silly twists to a shared family story. This simple storytelling game gets everyone laughing and practicing creativity. Each person adds a sentence to an ongoing story using picture prompts or random words. Paper Markers or crayons Small bowl or basket Sit in a circle on the floor or around a table. Ask each person to draw or write one simple word on a small piece of paper, then fold it and put it in the bowl. Choose one person to start the story using the phrase 'Once upon a time...'. Pass the bowl around; each person draws a word and must include it in their next sentence of the story. Continue until everyone has had several turns or until the story naturally comes to an end. Invite kids to give the story a title and, if they want, draw a quick cover picture. creative_writing language_skills act_shape_hunt_scavenger Shape Hunt Indoor Scavenger Game Kids race to find objects that match different shapes around the house. Turn a rainy afternoon into a playful math game. Children search for circles, squares, rectangles, and triangles using a simple checklist. Paper shape checklist Pencil or crayon Timer (optional) Create a simple checklist with shapes like circles, squares, rectangles, and triangles with a few boxes next to each. Explain that kids will search for household objects that match each shape. Set a timer for 5–10 minutes and start the shape hunt. When time is up, gather together and have each child share what they found for each shape. Count how many items match each shape and talk about where shapes show up in everyday life. Optional: Repeat with colors or textures for an extra round. math_skills indoor_game scavenger_hunt act_sock_puppet_theater Sock Puppet Theater Make simple sock puppets and put on a mini family show. Kids design characters using old socks and craft supplies, then act out a short story or favorite fairy tale behind a couch or table 'stage'. pages.dataKeywords: account_billing Account & Billing Manage your subscription, payments, invoices, and billing details. account_profiles Account & Profiles Profiles, parental controls, viewing restrictions, and PIN settings. watching_on_tv Watching on TV Set up and troubleshoot the app on smart TVs and TV devices. android_phone_tablet Android phone or tablet Using the streaming app on Android phones and tablets, including downloads and subtitles. smart_tv Smart TV Watching on built-in smart TV apps and streaming sticks. computer Computer Streaming in web browsers and desktop apps on Windows, macOS, and Linux. set_top_box Set-top box Using the app on cable boxes, streaming boxes, and media players. default_account canada card family_plan_account united_states paypal_user united_kingdom paypal eu_trial_account germany other basic Basic Basic plan with SD streaming on one device at a time. You can download videos on 1 phone or tablet at a time with the Basic plan. standard Standard Standard plan with HD and some 4K titles, plus downloads on multiple devices. You can download videos on up to 2 phones or tablets at a time on the Standard plan; download limits also apply per title and per account. premium Premium Premium plan with 4K Ultra HD and HDR on supported devices, plus maximum download flexibility. You can download videos on up to 4 phones or tablets at a time on the Premium plan, with higher limits for total downloadable titles. kids_profile Kids little_kids tween_profile Alex (13) teens favorite sport teen_profile Jordan adult_profile Main adults first pet streaming_quality Streaming quality 4K and HD requirements, buffering fixes, and improving video quality. downloads Downloads How to download videos, manage storage, and understand download limits by plan. subtitles_captions_audio Subtitles, captions & audio Turn subtitles on or off, change subtitle or audio language, and troubleshoot caption issues. app_issues App issues Fix crashes, sign-in problems, and other app behavior issues on any device. getting_started Getting started Create an account, choose a plan, and start watching on your favorite devices. payment_methods_charges Payment methods & charges Update your card, change billing country, and understand your charges. parental_controls_pins Parental controls & PINs Set maturity ratings, create profile-level controls, and add PINs to restrict changes. canceling_subscription Canceling your subscription Cancel your membership from a web browser, TV app, or mobile device. streaming_issues Streaming issues Fix buffering, error codes, and playback problems on TVs and other devices. android_streaming_quality android_downloads android_subtitles_captions_audio android_app_issues android_getting_started smart_tv_streaming_quality smart_tv_streaming_issues smart_tv_subtitles_captions_audio smart_tv_app_issues smart_tv_getting_started computer_streaming_quality computer_streaming_issues computer_app_issues computer_downloads computer_canceling_subscription set_top_

pages.dataKeywords: article_fed_itc_2026_update 2026 Federal Solar Tax Credit Guide: What Homeowners Need to Know 2026-federal-solar-tax-credit-guide A up-to-date overview of the federal solar Investment Tax Credit (ITC) for 2026, including eligibility, credit amounts, and how to claim it. The Federal Solar Investment Tax Credit (ITC) remains one of the most powerful incentives for homeowners considering solar in 2026. In this guide, we cover who qualifies, how the percentage credit works, how it interacts with state incentives, and what documentation you need when filing your federal tax return. We also discuss timelines, including when projects must begin construction and be placed in service to qualify for a given tax year... incentives federal solar tax credit residential solar incentives 2026 policy blog/federal-solar-tax-credit-2026-guide.html article_fed_itc_2025_changes Federal Solar Tax Credit Changes in 2025: Timeline and Phaseouts federal-solar-tax-credit-2025-changes Learn how the federal solar tax credit is scheduled to change through 2025 and what that means for your installation timeline. The federal solar tax credit has a defined schedule set by recent legislation. In 2025, certain step-downs take effect for some project types while residential projects maintain a stable percentage. In this article we outline the official IRS guidance, project start and completion rules, and how commercial, residential, and nonprofit projects are each affected... timeline incentives 2025 blog/federal-solar-tax-credit-2025-changes.html article_itc_step_by_step How to Claim the Federal Solar Tax Credit Step by Step how-to-claim-federal-solar-tax-credit A practical walkthrough of the forms and documentation needed to claim the federal solar tax credit on your tax return. Claiming the federal solar tax credit requires a few key forms and documents. We break down Form 5695, how to calculate your credit amount, what qualifies as eligible costs, and how carryovers work if your tax liability is lower than the credit in the first year... tax filing blog/how-to-claim-federal-solar-tax-credit.html article_state_incentives_2026 2026 State Solar Incentives: Rebates, SRECs, and Property Tax Exemptions 2026-state-solar-incentives Compare key state-level incentives that can stack with the federal solar tax credit to lower your out-of-pocket cost. Beyond the federal ITC, many states offer additional incentives including rebates, Solar Renewable Energy Credits (SRECs), and property or sales tax exemptions. This guide summarizes the major programs by region and explains which stack with the federal credit... state incentives rebates srecs blog/2026-state-solar-incentives.html article_solar_101_homeowners Solar 101 for Homeowners: Panels, Inverters, and Batteries Explained solar-101-for-homeowners New to solar? learning, aggregated to 1 km grid cells. deforestation southeast_asia cc_by geojson ds_defor_seasia_2024_cover Southeast Asia Forest Cover Change Tiles (2000–2024) Annual forest cover and loss statistics for Southeast Asia at 30 m resolution, tiled by subregion. shapefile ds_defor_global_2001_2023 Global Annual Deforestation Rates (2001–2023) Country-level annual deforestation estimates compiled from multiple remote sensing products. global cc_by_sa ds_defor_africa_roads_impact Road Expansion and Forest Loss in Central Africa (2005–2020) Panel dataset linking new road construction to forest loss in Central African countries. africa cc_by_nc ds_urban_pm25_sensors_2018_2025 Global Urban PM2.5 Sensor Network (2018–2025) Hourly PM2.5 measurements from low-cost sensors deployed in 120 cities worldwide. urban_air_quality json ds_coastal_erosion_shorelines_global Global Shoreline Change and Coastal Erosion Indicators (1984–2020) Shoreline positions and erosion/accretion rates for sandy coasts derived from satellite imagery. coastal_restoration multiple_regions ds_africa_freshwater_biodiversity_occ African Freshwater Biodiversity Occurrence Records Curated occurrence records for freshwater fish, invertebrates, and plants across African river basins. freshwater_biodiversity ds_sa_coastal_water_quality_profiles South American Coastal Water Quality Profiles (2010–2024) Vertical profiles of temperature, salinity, nutrients, and chlorophyll from coastal monitoring stations. water_quality south_america netcdf ds_microplastics_beach_transects_global Global Beach Microplastics Transects (2012–2022) Microplastics particle counts and polymer types from standardized beach transects worldwide. microplastics ds_europe_renewable_energy_sites European Renewable pages.dataKeywords: main_clinic_downtown Main Clinic  Downtown Primary pediatric endocrinology clinic with full diagnostic services, diabetes education, and onsite lab. 123 West 125th Street Suite 400 New York 212-555-0100 212-555-0199 MonFri 8:00 AM5:30 PM; Sat 8:30 AM1:00 PM; Sun closed. uptown_specialty_center Uptown Pediatric Specialty Center Smaller satellite clinic focused on diabetes and thyroid follow-up visits. 455 Malcolm X Boulevard 2nd Floor 212-555-0105 212-555-0195 Mon, Wed, Thu 9:00 AM4:00 PM; Tue, Fri closed. eastside_clinic Eastside Childrens Endocrine Clinic Endocrine clinic with emphasis on growth, puberty, and bone health evaluations. 910 Lexington Avenue Suite 300 212-555-0112 212-555-0182 MonThu 8:30 AM4:30 PM; Fri 8:30 AM1:00 PM. north_suburban_clinic North Suburban Pediatric Endocrine Clinic Community-based clinic offering diabetes technology training and evening classes. 75 Maple Avenue White Plains 914-555-0200 914-555-0299 MonFri 9:00 AM7:00 PM; select Sat diabetes classes. type_1_diabetes Type 1 Diabetes Autoimmune form of diabetes in which the pancreas produces little or no insulin, requiring lifelong insulin therapy. type_2_diabetes Type 2 Diabetes A form of diabetes often associated with insulin resistance, more common in adolescents with overweight or obesity. thyroid_disorders Thyroid Disorders Conditions affecting thyroid hormone production, including hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, nodules, and autoimmune thyroid disease. growth_hormone_deficiency Growth Hormone Deficiency A condition in which the pituitary gland does not produce enough growth hormone, leading to slow growth in children. precocious_puberty Precocious (Early) Puberty Puberty that begins earlier than expected, usually before age 8 in girls and age 9 in boys. delayed_puberty Delayed Puberty Puberty that starts later than usual, which can be normal or related to hormone or health problems. obesity_insulin_resistance Obesity and Insulin Resistance Weight-related conditions that increase the bodys need for insulin and can lead to prediabetes or Type 2 diabetes. adrenal_disorders Adrenal Disorders Conditions affecting the adrenal glands, such as adrenal insufficiency, Cushing syndrome, or congenital adrenal hyperplasia. pituitary_disorders Pituitary Disorders Problems involving the pituitary gland that can affect growth, puberty, thyroid, adrenal, and other hormones. calcium_bone_disorders Calcium and Bone Disorders Metabolic bone diseases, including low bone density, rickets, and disorders of calcium or vitamin D. polycystic_ovary_syndrome Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) A hormone condition that can cause irregular periods, extra hair growth, and ovarian cysts in teens and young adults. congenital_adrenal_hyperplasia Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia A group of inherited disorders affecting adrenal hormone production, often diagnosed in infancy or childhood. disorders_of_sex_development pages.dataKeywords:
dev_anxiety_casting_cares Casting Your Cares on Him casting-your-cares-on-him Name your worries and place them into the caring hands of Jesus, who invites you to cast every anxiety on Him. anxiety peace trust hope 1 Peter 5:6-7 Matthew 11:28-30 Sarah Thompson published dev_anxiety_be_still Be Still in the Middle of the Storm be-still-in-the-middle-of-the-storm In anxious moments, God invites you to stillness rooted in the unshakable truth of who He is. rest presence_of_god Psalm 46:1-11 Mark 4:35-41 Daniel Kim dev_anxiety_midnight_prayers Midnight Prayers for the Anxious Heart midnight-prayers-for-the-anxious-heart When anxiety keeps you awake, turn your "what ifs" into prayers and let God’s promises sing you back to rest. night prayer Psalm 4:8 Psalm 121:1-8 Job 35:10 Emily Rivera dev_anxiety_truth_over_feelings Choosing Truth Over Feelings choosing-truth-over-feelings Feelings can be loud, but God’s promises are louder. Let truth, not anxiety, have the final word. identity renewing_mind Romans 12:2 2 Corinthians 10:3-5 Michael Lee dev_anxiety_not_alone You Are Not Alone in Your Anxiety you-are-not-alone-in-your-anxiety Anxiety thrives in isolation, but God meets you through His Word and His people so you don’t have to walk alone. community encouragement 1 Kings 19:1-8 2 Corinthians 1:3-4 Galatians 6:2 Grace Mitchell dev_marriage_serving_spouse Serving Your Spouse Like Christ serving-your-spouse-like-christ Christlike love in marriage looks like daily, practical service. Jesus washed His disciples’ feet, demonstrating that greatness in His kingdom is found in humble love.

Ask the Lord to show you one specific way to serve your spouse today without expecting anything in return. As you do, you mirror the heart of Christ in your home. Humble, practical service is a powerful way to display Christ’s love in your marriage. marriage service love John 13:1-17 Philippians 2:3-5 Rachel Owens dev_forgiveness_roots Pulling Up the Roots of Bitterness pulling-up-the-roots-of-bitteress Unforgiveness grows like roots that choke out joy. God calls us to forgive as we have been forgiven in Christ. This does not minimize the pain we’ve experienced, but it releases our hearts from the prison of bitterness.

Begin by honestly naming the hurt before God. Ask Him for the grace to move toward forgiveness, even if your feelings are not there yet. Forgiveness pulls up the roots of bitterness so God’s grace can grow in their place. forgiveness bitterness healing Ephesians 4:31-32 Hebrews 12:14-15 Jonathan Perez dev_general_daily_bread Daily Bread for Today’s Needs daily-bread-for-todays-needs Jesus teaches us to pray for daily bread, not yearly storage. God’s provision often comes one day at a time, inviting us to trust Him in the present moment rather than hoarding for every possible future.

Ask God today for the specific grace you need right now, and thank Him in advance for the ways He will provide tomorrow. God meets today’s needs with today’s grace, inviting you to

pages.dataKeywords: div_8u 8U Division Entry-level division for players ages 7–8 focused on fundamentals, coach pitch, and fun introductions to fastpitch softball. div_10u 10U Division Recreational and beginner-friendly play for ages 9–10 with live pitching introduced and continued focus on fundamentals. div_12u 12U Division Competitive play for ages 11–12 with full fastpitch rules, advanced skills development, and division-specific equipment regulations. div_14u 14U Division Intermediate to advanced division for ages 13–14 with full game rules, standings, and expanded tournament play. div_16u 16U Division Advanced division for ages 15–16 focused on high school prep, position specialization, and showcase-style competition. field_1 Field 1 North Complex, 100 League Way, Springfield Regulation fastpitch field with bleachers on the first-base side. Commonly used for 12U and 14U evening games. field_2 Field 2 Primary lighted field adjacent to the main concession stand. Preferred for night games and evening volunteer shifts. field_3 Field 3 South Complex, 255 Softball Drive, Springfield Daytime practice field without lights. Often used for younger divisions and clinics. batting_cages Batting Cages Between Fields 1 & 2, North Complex Four-station batting cage area with pitching machines available by reservation for clinics and team practices. gc_alex_miller Alex Miller 555-123-4567 alex.miller@example.com email gc_taylor_smith Taylor Smith 555-987-6543 taylor.smith@example.com text gc_riley_parent Jordan Riley 555-444-8899 riley.parent@example.com gc_default_guardian Primary Guardian 555-000-1111 guardian@example.com phone cat_apparel apparel Apparel Youth and adult shirts, jerseys, hoodies, and other league-branded clothing. cat_hats hats Hats & Caps Adjustable and fitted caps for players, coaches, and fans. cat_accessories accessories Accessories Water bottles, bags, stickers, and other softball accessories. cat_equipment equipment Equipment Helmets, training aids, and other gear approved for league use. cat_other other Other Miscellaneous league items, fees, and digital products. spring_2026 Spring 2026 Season spring summer_2026 Summer 2026 Season summer fall_2026 Fall 2026 Season fall spring_2025 Spring 2025 Season clinic_july26_pitching_power_12u July 2026 12U Pitching Power Clinic pitching Four-evening 12U pitching clinic focused on mechanics, accuracy, and strength. Sessions run from 5:00–7:30 PM at Field 2 under the lights. clinic_july26_pitching_fundamentals_10u July 2026 10U Pitching Fundamentals Two-day fundamentals clinic for new and developing 10U pitchers. Emphasis on grip, stride, and safe workload. clinic_july26_pitching_elite_14u July 2026 14U Elite Pitching Lab Advanced 14U pitching lab with video analysis and spin-rate tracking. Designed for experienced pitchers preparing for high school play. clinic_july26_hitting_camp_all_skills July 2026 All-Division Hitting Camp hitting Three-afternoon camp focused on hitting approach, tee and front-toss work, and l

family_value_night_1m Family Value Night 1-Month Family membership with extended evening hours ideal for late swimmers and after-work workouts. 23:00 family_plus_1m Family Plus 1-Month Premium 1-month family membership with extended late-night access and free guest days. 05:30 family_pool_only_1m Family Pool-Only 1-Month Family membership with access to indoor and outdoor pools, no fitness center access. 21:00 family_summer_3m Family Summer 3-Month Seasonal summer membership for families with access to all pools and fitness center. three_month family_inactive_1m Family Legacy 1-Month (Inactive) Legacy family plan no longer offered to new members. inactive individual_basic_1m Individual Basic 1-Month Standard 1-month individual membership with pool and fitness access. individual individual_premium_3m Individual Premium 3-Month Extended 3-month individual membership with early morning access and free towel service. 05:00 22:30 senior_daytime_annual Senior Daytime Annual Discounted annual membership for seniors with daytime access to pool and fitness center. senior annual 07:00 16:00 youth_swim_1m Youth Swim 1-Month Youth membership focused on recreational and lap swimming access. youth 06:30 20:00 birthday_splash_bash_basic Splash Bash Basic Birthday Party 2-hour birthday party with shared pool time, private party room, and cheese pizza for the group. birthday_party saturday sunday birthday_splash_bash_plus Splash Bash Plus Birthday Party Premium 2.5-hour party with private room, pool games led by a host, and pizza plus drinks for up to 15 kids. birthday_splash_bash_deluxe Splash Bash Deluxe Birthday Party 3-hour all-inclusive party with private room, decorated tables, multiple pizza options, and goody bags. birthday_room_only Pool Party Room-Only Package 2-hour private room rental adjacent to the pool. Food not included; outside food allowed. friday birthday_pizza_no_room Pool Pizza Party (Shared Seating) Shared party area on the pool deck with reserved tables and pizza included, no private room. birthday_private_room_no_food Private Room Birthday (No Food Included) Private party room with access to the pool; families bring their own food and cake. room_rental_meeting Community Room Rental Meeting-style room rental with tables and chairs, no pool access included. room_rental monday tuesday wednesday thursday other_overnight_lockin Overnight Pool Lock-In Exclusive overnight lock-in with lifeguards, games, and optional pizza add-on. other digital_guest_single Single-Visit Digital Guest Pass One-time digital guest pass valid for a single visit to any open swim or lap swim session. guest_passes digital_pass digital_guest_single_discount Discount Digital Guest Pass Discounted single-visit digital guest pass available during promotional periods. digital_guest_five 5-Visit Digital Gu

pages.body: St. Andrew Church Creating communities of wholeness with Christ at the center Home Plan a Visit Sermons Events Serve Give Care & Counseling My Events Watch Later Giving & Ministries Online Giving & Pledges Learn about our ministries Other ways to give (coming soon) Secure online form Online Giving & Pledges Use this form to set up a pledge or make an immediate gift to one of our church funds. You can choose a ministry area, select how often you would like to give, and share your contact information so we can confirm your commitment. Thank you for your commitment Pledge ID – Status – Fund – Amount – Giving type – Frequency – We couldn't complete your request Giving type Choose whether this is an ongoing pledge or a one-time immediate gift. Fund / designation* Loading funds... Funds shown here are currently active and available for online giving. Amount* $ Enter the amount you wish to pledge or give now. Frequency* Loading options... Choose how often this amount will be given (including one-time). Your name* Email address* We'll email you a confirmation of your pledge or gift. Start date (optional) If you are setting up a pledge that starts in the future, choose that date here. Notes (optional) Include any details you'd like our stewardship team to know. By submitting this form, you are authorizing St. Andrew Church to record your pledge or giving commitment as described above. Submit pledge or gift Summary As you complete the form, your pledge or gift details will appear here. Fund Not selected Amount $0.00 Giving type – Frequency – Your name – Email – Start date As soon as possible You will receive a confirmation email after submitting your pledge or gift. pages.dataKeywords: pastor_michelle_okafor Michelle Okafor Michelle Okafor Pastor Michelle serves as the Pastor of Care & Counseling, overseeing pastoral care, support groups, and one-on-one counseling. With a background in marriage and family therapy, she specializes in marriage counseling, communication, and relational healing. She also leads workshops for couples and mentors young families in the church. michelle.okafor@gracecommunitychurch.org (555) 201-4823 marriage_counseling marriage_and_family communication_issues conflict_resolution premarital_counseling pastor_david_chen David Chen David Chen Pastor David is the Lead Teaching Pastor, responsible for Sunday preaching, vision, and leadership development. In addition to preaching, he offers limited counseling focused on spiritual direction and individual counseling for adults navigating transitions, doubt, and calling. david.chen@gracecommunitychurch.org (555) 347-9081 individual_counseling spiritual_direction anxiety_and_stress life_transitions pastor_elena_rodriguez Elena Rodriguez Elena Rodriguez Pastor Elena oversees Youth and Young Adult Ministries, equipping the next generation to follow Christ. She frequently counsels students and young adults around identity, anxiety, and family relationships, and partners with parents to support teens in crisis. elena.rodriguez@gracecommunitychurch.org (555) 773-1194 youth_counseling young_adult_issues family_conflict identity_issues pastor_mark_thompson Mark Thompson Mark Thompson Pastor Mark serves as the Pastor of Groups & Discipleship, coordinating small groups, Bible studies, and discipleship pathways. While his primary role is not counseling, he provides pastoral guidance for group leaders and occasionally meets with individuals for prayer and spiritual encouragement. mark.thompson@gracecommunitychurch.org (555) 629-3340 discipleship_coaching pastor_grace_nelson Grace Nelson Grace Nelson Pastor Grace previously led the Congregational Care team, focusing on grief care and hospital visitation. She is currently on sabbatical and not taking new counseling appointments, but her past resources and teaching continue to serve the church. grace.nelson@gracecommunitychurch.org (555) 415-6729 grief_care end_of_life_support hospital_visitation room_fellowship_hall_a Fellowship Hall A Large multi-purpose hall suitable for classes, receptions, and church-wide gatherings. Partitionable space with flexible seating. Main Building, Lower Level projector sound_system wifi podium round_tables room_conference_101 Conference Room 101 Mid-sized conference room ideal for ministry team meetings, small trainings, and midweek Bible studies. Education Wing, First Floor tv_display whiteboard conference_phone room_classroom_204 Classroom 204 Standard classroom with movable desks, commonly used for adult classes and workshops. Education Wing, Second Floor stackable_chairs room_prayer_chapel Prayer Chapel Quiet, intimate chapel space suited for prayer gatherings, small group meetings, and cou

Class B airspace surrounds the busiest airports in the national airspace system and is designed to contain all published instrument procedures...  Class B airspace Airspace article_detail.html?articleId=art_class_b_overview art_class_b_clearances Getting and Reading a Class B Clearance Step-by-step guidance on requesting, copying, and complying with Class B clearances. Before entering Class B airspace, you must hear the magic words: 'Cleared into the Bravo'... This article walks through sample radio calls and scenarios...  Radio communications article_detail.html?articleId=art_class_b_clearances art_class_b_traffic_patterns Flying Traffic Patterns Near Class B Airports How to safely integrate with pattern traffic just outside Class B shelves. Operating at satellite airports under or near Class B shelves requires heightened situational awareness... We will look at common pattern conflicts, recommended altitudes, and coordination with ATC...  Traffic patterns Safety article_detail.html?articleId=art_class_b_traffic_patterns art_class_b_mistakes_long Top 10 Class B Violations and How to Avoid Them A deep dive into common pilot mistakes involving Class B airspace, with case studies. Class B incursions remain a focus area for regulators and training providers alike... This long-form article analyzes representative NASA reports and enforcement actions...  Regulations Case studies article_detail.html?articleId=art_class_b_mistakes_long art_class_c_vs_b Class C vs. Class B: What’s the Difference? Compare the structure, communication requirements, and services of Class C and Class B airspace. While both Class B and Class C airspace protect traffic around busy airports, there are key differences in clearance requirements, separation services, and weather minima... pages.body: LUQUE MACHINES Home CNC Milling Machines Build Your Machine Spare Parts Training Maintenance Plans Industries - Aerospace Downloads Dealer Locator Cart Configure a CNC milling system Start from a machine family, then fine-tune spindle, enclosure, automation, and accessories. Search Quickly jump to a machine model, spare part, manual, or reference case study. Search results Close Select a machine family to configure Only currently configurable and active CNC milling families are shown. No configurable machine families are currently available Our configurable CNC platforms are temporarily unavailable or under maintenance. Please check back soon or contact our sales team for assistance with standard machine models. How the configuration and quote process works 1. Choose a machine family. Pick the CNC milling family that best matches your work envelope, axis count, and application. 2. Configure technical options. On the next page (build_machine.html), you will select spindle, tool changer, coolant, enclosure, and accessory options. 3. Review pricing. The configurator calculates a live estimate based on your choices, starting from the base machine price. 4. Submit a quote request. When you are satisfied with your configuration, submit your details to request a formal proposal from LUQUE MACHINES. LUQUE MACHINES Precision CNC milling systems engineered for industrial performance. pages.body: Character driven. Reader approved. Author Name Home Books Blog Events Library About Contact Contact Use this form for questions about the books, events, media, or bulk orders. Other ways to reach me Once your message is received, I may reply directly by email or through my publisher or event partners if that is more appropriate for your request. For media and rights & permissions, you may also contact the publicist or rights team listed in the publisher catalogue for faster routing. For events, include your venue, city, approximate audience size, and preferred dates in your original message so follow-up is straightforward. For bulk orders (for example, 25 paperbacks for a class or book club), I can help connect you with the best ordering route in your region. Topic* Select a topic Name* Email* Subject* Message* All fields marked with * are required. Send Return to Home Author Name Character driven. Reader approved. pages.dataKeywords: online_qna_march4_2025 Online Q&A: Worldbuilding Secrets A live online Q&A session focused on worldbuilding, magic systems, and creating believable fantasy settings. online Online Zoom link will be emailed to registered attendees 24 hours before the event. America/New_York online_launch_march10_2025 Virtual Book Launch: Echoes of Starlight Celebrate the launch of "Echoes of Starlight" with a live reading, behind-the-scenes stories, and audience Q&A. Event will be streamed via YouTube Live; link provided upon registration. online_workshop_march18_2025 Online Workshop: Plotting Multi-Book Series A two-hour interactive workshop on planning and outlining long-running fantasy and sci-fi series. Workshop hosted on Crowdcast; access details sent after registration. online_bookclub_march29_2025 Online Book Club: Discussing "Shadows in Orbit" Join the monthly reader book club to discuss characters, themes, and your favorite moments from "Shadows in Orbit". Hosted via Google Meet; a join link will appear on your confirmation page. bookstore_signing_march1_2025 Bookstore Signing: Riverstone Books In-person signing and meet-and-greet at Riverstone Books, with a short reading and photo opportunities. in_person Riverstone Books, Pittsburgh, PA festival_panel_march22_2025 Hybrid Panel: Writing Hopeful Futures A hybrid panel at the Spring Storytelling Festival featuring several authors discussing optimistic speculative fiction. hybrid Spring Storytelling Festival, Austin, TX + Online Livestream Festival livestream portal; login details provided with festival registration. pages.dataKeywords: proj_asphalt_midtown_480 Midtown Asphalt Driveway Resurfacing – 2-Car Home Resurfaced a worn 2-car asphalt driveway with fresh overlay and clean edges. asphalt Midtown Atlanta, GA This 2-car driveway had extensive surface cracking and faded sealant. We milled high spots, repaired potholes, and applied a new 1.5" asphalt overlay with clean transitions to the sidewalk and garage slab. proj_asphalt_buckhead_720 Buckhead Hillside Asphalt Driveway Replacement Full-depth replacement of a sloped asphalt driveway with improved drainage. Buckhead, Atlanta, GA Removed the failing asphalt down to the base, regraded for better water runoff, compacted new aggregate, and installed a 3" asphalt driveway with crisp edging and a standard finish. proj_asphalt_decatur_650 Decatur Family Home Asphalt Driveway Upgrade New asphalt surface with widened parking pad for a growing family. Decatur, GA The original narrow driveway was replaced and widened to allow two vehicles side by side. Included base repairs, new asphalt installation, and standard finish suitable for everyday residential use. proj_asphalt_east_atlanta_350 East Atlanta Bungalow Asphalt Patch & Seal Smaller asphalt driveway with patch repairs and fresh sealcoat. East Atlanta, GA Performed localized patching of potholes and low spots, crack filling, and a two-coat seal over the existing asphalt surface to extend its life. proj_asphalt_sandy_springs_900 Sandy Springs Estate Asphalt Circle Drive Large circular asphalt driveway with guest parking area. Sandy Springs, GA Installed a new full-depth asphalt circle drive with integrated guest parking. Included under-drain installation and decorative border cuts. proj_concrete_suburban_600 Suburban Brushed Concrete Driveway – 600 sq ft Standard brushed concrete driveway with control joints and 4" slab. concrete Marietta, GA Removed old cracked concrete and installed a new 4" reinforced slab with broom finish, control joints, and a 3-year workmanship warranty. proj_concrete_inman_park_450 Inman Park Narrow Concrete Driveway Compact concrete driveway suited for a tight intown lot. Inman Park, Atlanta, GA Installed a reinforced concrete driveway with a slightly exposed aggregate border to match the historic character of the home. proj_concrete_vinings_900 Vinings Oversized Concrete Driveway Replacement Oversized driveway replacement with integrated walkway. Vinings, GA Complete tear-out and replacement of a large, cracked concrete driveway. Added a broom-finished walkway and improved apron at the street. proj_paver_brookhaven_550 Brookhaven Paver Driveway with Border Accent Concrete paver driveway with contrasting soldier-course border. paver Brookhaven, GA Excavated existing gravel, installed compacted base and bedding sand, and laid concrete pavers in a herringbone pattern with a darker border course. proj_paver_virginia_highland_800 Virginia-Highland Decorative Paver Drive Decorative paver driveway blending with historic brick home. Virginia-Highland, Atlanta, GA

pages.dataKeywords: blog_starter Starter Blog Perfect for small businesses that want to publish at least one high-quality article per month. 1 SEO-optimized blog post per month Keyword research for each post Basic stock imagery included One round of revisions active blog_growth Growth Blog Build consistent authority with weekly blog content tailored to your audience. 4 SEO-optimized blog posts per month Keyword & topic clustering Custom graphics for select posts Two rounds of revisions Editorial calendar planning blog_pro Pro Blog For brands that want to dominate organic search with frequent, in-depth content. 8 SEO-optimized blog posts per month Advanced keyword and competitor analysis Content briefs aligned with buyer journey Dedicated content strategist Up to three rounds of revisions blog_enterprise Enterprise Content Program High-volume content production for enterprises with aggressive growth targets. 16+ long-form assets per month (blogs, guides, or case studies) Editorial board and content operations planning Dedicated account manager and strategist Priority turnaround times Quarterly performance and content gap analysis cs_retail_omnichannel_it_video Omnichannel Retail Refresh with Managed IT and In-Store Video Experiences omnichannel-retail-it-video-refresh retail it_support video_production cloud_services email_collaboration UrbanWalk Footwear How a national shoe retailer stabilized store IT, launched in-store video walls, and boosted sales 18% in 6 months. cs_retail_pop_up_experience Pop-Up Retail Experience Powered by IT Support and Launch Video Campaign retail-pop-up-it-video-experience web_hosting social_media_management BrightCart Collective A fashion pop-up concept used our managed IT and video team to launch in three cities in 30 days. BrightCart Collective needed a repeatable technology and media playbook for rotating pop-up stores. We delivered a turnkey IT kit with secure Wi-Fi, managed tablets, and remote support for each city. Our video crew captured each opening event and produced a 90-second highlight reel and short social clips. Combined with a campaign microsite we hosted and maintained, the brand saw 40% higher engagement than previous launches and collected 12,000 new email subscribers. cs_healthcare_cloud_rmm Securing a Multi-Clinic Healthcare Network with Cloud Backup and RMM healthcare-cloud-backup-rmm healthcare remote_monitoring_management Greenway Family Clinics 24/7 monitoring and cloud backup helped a growing clinic network improve uptime and compliance. Greenway Family Clinics struggled with inconsistent patching and unreliable local backups. We deployed our Remote Monitoring & Management (RMM) platform across 140 endpoints, automated updates and health checks, and layered in encrypted cloud backup to a HIPAA-ready environment. When a ransomware incident hit a satellite clinic, we restored all impacted systems from immutable backups within two hours and avoided any data loss. cs_finance_secure_email Modernizing Email & Collabora

pages.dataKeywords: expedite_filing_basic EXPEDITE_BASIC Expedited Filing (Standard) Moves your estate planning documents to the front of our standard processing queue with a 5-business-day turnaround. basic attorney_review_standard ATTY_REVIEW_STD Attorney Review & Recommendations A licensed estate planning attorney reviews your documents, suggests revisions, and answers up to 3 follow-up questions by email. standard notary_mobile_premium MOBILE_NOTARY_PREM Mobile Notary Service A mobile notary meets you at your home or office to notarize your estate planning documents (within 25 miles of a firm office). premium annual_review_standard ANNUAL_REVIEW Annual Estate Plan Checkup One annual review of your estate planning documents for up to 3 years, with recommended updates based on law changes. document_binder_basic ESTATE_BINDER Printed Binder & Digital Vault Professionally printed copies of your documents in an organized binder plus secure digital storage for 5 years. last_will_standard last_will Last Will and Testament Directs how your assets are distributed, names an executor, and can nominate guardians for minor children. durable_poa_financial durable_power_of_attorney Durable Power of Attorney Authorizes a trusted person to handle your financial and legal affairs if you become incapacitated. ahcd_medical advance_healthcare_directive Advance Healthcare Directive Sets out your medical treatment preferences and appoints a healthcare agent to make decisions if you cannot. revocable_living_trust living_trust Revocable Living Trust Helps avoid probate and manage how and when your assets are distributed during life and after death. guardianship_nomination_minor guardianship_nomination Guardianship Nomination Formally nominates guardians for minor children in the event of your incapacity or death. sf_soma San Francisco – SoMa Office 575 Market Street, Suite 2400 San Francisco 415-555-0123 soma@harborpointlaw.com Mon–Fri 8:30 AM–6:00 PM; pages.title: Konnect AI - Routing Rules
pages.metaDesc: Configure, prioritize, and manage rules that route conversations to inboxes based on message content and other conditions.
pages.headings: Routing Rules | Rules overview | New routing rule | Rule details | Evaluation settings | Conditions | Branch actions | No routing rules yet
pages.linkTitles: Konnect AI home | Main navigation | Routing rules configuration area | Routing rules list | Routing rule editor | Footer navigation
pages.body: ODF Home Bots Automations Analytics Knowledge Base Settings Pricing GET A DEMO Routing Rules Configure, prioritize, and manage rules that route conversations to inboxes based on message content and other conditions. Back to Settings Create rule Rules overview Evaluation order runs from top to bottom. Drag or move rules to change priority. Create rule Rules are evaluated globally based on this order. Once a rule matches, its branch action determines which inbox and priority is used. Routing rules New routing rule Draft Rule details Name and describe how this rule should behave for your team. Rule name* Description Status* Active Inactive Draft Evaluation settings Control when this rule runs and which conversations it applies to. Evaluation event* On first customer message On every message Schedule* Always on Business hours only Scope* Global Single workspace Conditions Define how conversations are matched into branches. Groups combine conditions with AND/OR logic. Add condition group Branch actions For each branch, choose which inbox to assign and which priority to set when the rule matches. Cancel changes Close Save rule No routing rules yet Use routing rules to automatically send pricing questions to Sales, technical issues to Support, and everything else to your default inbox. Start with one or two simple rules. You can refine branches and priorities as your volume grows. Create your first rule New conversations Pricing keywords → Sales inbox Error / bug keywords → Support inbox Other → General inbox ODF AI customer communications for modern teams. About Contact Knowledge Base Pricing © Konnect AI. All rights reserved.

pages.dataKeywords: evaluations Evaluations Endpoints for creating, listing, and managing evaluation runs, including batch evaluations and comparison runs. datasets Datasets Endpoints for creating, importing, and managing datasets used in evaluations. projects Projects Endpoints for managing projects, which group datasets, evaluations, and configurations. metrics Metrics Endpoints for listing available metrics and retrieving metric configuration schemas. auth Authentication Endpoints related to API keys and authentication helpers. proj_123 Demo Text Classification Project Sample project used throughout the docs for quickstarts and API examples, including batch evaluation runs. proj_qa_benchmark QA Benchmark Suite Project containing large-scale QA and summarization benchmarks used in advanced examples. proj_js_sdk_samples JavaScript SDK Samples Project backing the JavaScript SDK examples, including runBatchEvaluation helper snippets. proj_playground_sandbox Playground Sandbox Isolated sandbox project used by the interactive playground for ad-hoc evaluations. site ds_tc_reviews_small Text Classification - Product Reviews (Small) Sample product review classification dataset used in the Python quickstart, balanced between positive and negative labels. ds_tc_reviews_medium Text Classification - Product Reviews (Medium) Medium-sized product review dataset for evaluating accuracy and F1 on sentiment classification tasks. ds_tc_support_tickets Support Ticket Categorization Customer support tickets labeled by issue type, ideal for multi-class text classification evaluations. ds_qa_open_domain_large Open-Domain QA Benchmark (Large) Large-scale open-domain QA benchmark aligned with BLEU and ROUGE-based evaluation examples. ds_summarization_news_bleu News Summarization with References (BLEU) News articles paired with human-written summaries, commonly evaluated using BLEU and ROUGE metrics. ds_translation_en_fr_bleu Machine Translation EN->FR (BLEU) Parallel English-French sentence pairs for BLEU-based machine translation evaluations. ds_code_gen_small Code Generation - Small Prompt Set Small set of code generation prompts used in JavaScript SDK batch evaluation examples. ds_batch_eval_demo Batch Evaluation Demo Dataset Generic mixed-task dataset used in runBatchEvaluation helper snippets and REST batch evaluation examples. ds_playground_quick_test Playground Quick Test Set Tiny sandbox dataset for running fast evaluations from the interactive playground. ds_playground_weighted_demo Weighted Metrics Demo Dataset Sample dataset configured for weighted accuracy and latency experiments in the playground. ds_v2_dataset_creation_example v2 Dataset Creation Example Dataset created via the v2 Create dataset endpoint, used in docs to demonstrate the /v2/datasets API. ds_v2_large_bleu_mt v2 MT Benchmark EN->DE (BLEU) Large machine translation benchmark for v2 BLEU-based evaluations, used in advanced examples with >1000 samples. v1 (Stable) v2 (Beta) sb_getting_started_overview getting_st
